name: miniapp-panel-studio
description: Tuya Ray 미니앱 패널 웹 저작도구 — panel.json 모델 → 완전한 Ray 저장소. 헤이홈 디자인 시스템 규격 강제.

scripts.p0: node src/generate.mjs panels/haatz-r6.panel.json && node src/compare.mjs panels/haatz-r6.panel.json
scripts.build:check: cd out/haatz-r6 && yarn install --frozen-lockfile && yarn build:tuya
scripts.build:check:light: node src/generate.mjs panels/light-rgbcw.panel.json out/light-tpl && cd out/light-tpl && yarn install --frozen-lockfile && yarn build:tuya
scripts.build:check:thermostat: node src/generate.mjs panels/thermostat.panel.json out/thermostat && cd out/thermostat && yarn install --frozen-lockfile && yarn build:tuya
scripts.build:check:curtain: node src/generate.mjs panels/curtain.panel.json out/curtain && cd out/curtain && yarn install --frozen-lockfile && yarn build:tuya
scripts.build:check:plug: node src/generate.mjs panels/plug-energy.panel.json out/plug-energy && cd out/plug-energy && yarn install --frozen-lockfile && yarn build:tuya
scripts.build:check:templates: npm run build:check:light && npm run build:check:thermostat && npm run build:check:curtain && npm run build:check:plug
